project.name: 하남 지점 어드민 (Hanam Branch Admin)
project.description: A branch administration system for a language study center managing members, leaders (tutors), attendance tracking, team scheduling, membership tiers, and communications for English and Japanese study programs.

nodes.name: Member Management
nodes.summary: Manages student members enrolled in English and Japanese study programs. Handles membership tiers (VVIP/VIP/A+/H+/B), reading levels (LV1-LV5), session tracking, expiry alerts, and member profiles.

businessRules: Membership tiers determine total session counts: VVIP=1040, VIP=520, A+=260, H+=120, B=60
Members are grouped by reading level LV1 through LV5 per language
Expiry alerts trigger at D-7 before membership expiration
First-visit check must be confirmed for new members
crossDomainInteractions: Members are assigned to teams organized by language and time slot
Member attendance is tracked per team session
Dashboard surfaces first-visit and new member reminders

nodes.name: Leader Management
nodes.summary: Manages leaders (tutors/facilitators) who lead study sessions. Tracks leader attendance status, substitute assignments, absence schedules, and team assignments across language and time slots.

businessRules: Leaders have five attendance statuses: expected, completed, substitute expected, substitute completed, absent
Leader status board shows a 7-day rolling view with language and time filters
Absent leaders require substitute assignment tracking
crossDomainInteractions: Leaders are assigned to teams shared with members
Leader status is surfaced on the main dashboard
Leader attendance affects member session availability

nodes.name: Attendance Tracking
nodes.summary: Tracks attendance for both members and leaders across study sessions. Provides attendance rate visualization, daily check-in status, and historical attendance block views.

businessRules: Attendance statuses: 출석예정 (expected), 출석완료 (completed), 대타예정 (substitute expected), 대타출석완료 (substitute completed), 불참 (absent)
Recent attendance rate is visualized with an 8-block display
Cumulative attendance rate is tracked per member profile
crossDomainInteractions: Attendance data is displayed in both member and leader management views

nodes.name: Team Scheduling
nodes.summary: Organizes study teams by language (English/Japanese) and recurring time slots (day + hour). Supports team tab navigation, bulk member/leader operations, and team-based filtering.

businessRules: Teams are organized by language (영어/일어) combined with day and time (e.g., 월수11시, 화목8시)
Members and leaders are assigned to specific team slots
Bulk actions (move, SMS, delete) can be applied to selected team members
crossDomainInteractions: Teams link members and leaders together for study sessions
Team filters are used across member and leader management pages

nodes.name: Dashboard & Communications
nodes.summary: Provides the main dashboard with calendar, notices, leader status overview, new member reminders, and communication features including SMS sending and phone number copying.

businessRules: Calendar events are color-coded: blue for new registration, green for consultation, orange for events
Tomorrow's new member reminders support quick-send functionality
SMS can be sent to bulk-selected members or leaders
crossDomainInteractions: Dashboard aggregates leader status from leader management
Dashboard shows first-visit members from member management
Calendar displays events related to member registration and consultations

nodes.name: Member Team Attendance View
nodes.summary: Displays member attendance organized by team tabs and reading levels, with search, filters, sorting, and level-based section navigation.

nodes.name: Member Alert Checks
nodes.summary: Surfaces actionable alerts for members requiring attention: first-visit unchecked members and memberships expiring within 7 days.

nodes.name: Member Profile View
nodes.summary: Displays detailed member profile modal with registration info, membership details, session counts, attendance rate, consultation comments, and history timeline.

domainMeta.entryPoint: Click member row in attendance table

nodes.name: Leader Team Attendance View
nodes.summary: Displays leader attendance organized by language and time slot tabs, with search, filters, sorting, and 7-day swipeable status board.

nodes.name: Leader Absence Tracking
nodes.summary: Tracks and displays leaders who are absent, supporting substitute assignment visibility and absence schedule management.

nodes.name: Dashboard Overview
nodes.summary: Renders the main dashboard with notices, leader status summary, first-visit study alerts, and new member reminders.

nodes.name: Calendar Management
nodes.summary: Displays a monthly calendar with color-coded events for registrations, consultations, and branch events, with modal detail views.

nodes.name: Leader Status Board
nodes.summary: Shows an expanded 7-day leader status board modal with day navigation, language and time filters, and attendance status summaries.

nodes.name: Bulk Member Actions
nodes.summary: Enables selecting multiple members and performing bulk operations: move to another team, send SMS, or delete.

nodes.name: Bulk Leader Actions
nodes.summary: Enables selecting multiple leaders and performing bulk operations: move to another team, send SMS, or delete.

nodes.name: Select Team Tab
nodes.summary: User selects a language (English/Japanese) and time slot tab to filter the member list by team.

nodes.name: Search and Filter Members
nodes.summary: Search members by name or phone number, apply sorting (attendance rate, name, age, remaining sessions, expiry date), and filter by membership tier.

nodes.name: Render Level Sections
nodes.summary: Groups and renders members into reading level sections (LV1-LV5), each with its own attendance table.

nodes.name: Display Attendance Table
nodes.summary: Renders the member attendance table with columns for member info, reading level, team, attendance status, memo, recent attendance rate visualization, today's check, and actions.

nodes.name: Mark Today's Attendance
nodes.summary: Allows marking a member's attendance status for today's session directly from the table.

nodes.name: Show First Visit Unchecked
nodes.summary: Displays members whose first visit has not been confirmed, with a resolve button to mark as checked.

nodes.name: Show Expiry D-7 Alerts
nodes.summary: Displays members whose membership expires within 7 days, with a resolve button to acknowledge.

nodes.name: Resolve Alert
nodes.summary: Marks an alert item as resolved, removing it from the active alerts list.

nodes.name: Open Profile Modal
nodes.summary: Opens the member profile modal when a member row is clicked in the attendance table.

nodes.name: Display Member Stats
nodes.summary: Shows registration date, membership tier, remaining sessions, start and expiry dates, and cumulative attendance rate.

nodes.name: Show Consultation History
nodes.summary: Displays consultation comments and history timeline for the member.

nodes.name: Select Language and Time Tab
nodes.summary: User selects language (English/Japanese) and time slot tabs to filter the leader list.

nodes.name: Search and Filter Leaders
nodes.summary: Search leaders by name or phone, filter by reading level, and sort by name, attendance rate, reading level, or today's attendance.

nodes.name: Display Leader Status Board
nodes.summary: Renders the 7-day swipeable leader status board with attendance status summaries and language/time filters.

nodes.name: Display Leader Attendance Table
nodes.summary: Renders the leader attendance table with member info, reading level, team, attendance/absence/substitute status, editable memo, 8-block attendance rate, today's check, and actions.

nodes.name: Mark Leader Attendance
nodes.summary: Allows marking a leader's attendance status for today including substitute options.

nodes.name: List Absent Leaders
nodes.summary: Displays the list of leaders who are absent for the current period.

nodes.name: View Substitute Status
nodes.summary: Shows substitute assignment status for absent leaders, including whether a substitute has been confirmed.

nodes.name: Render Notices
nodes.summary: Displays scrolling important announcements in the notices widget.

nodes.name: Render Leader Status Summary
nodes.summary: Shows today's leader attendance status overview with counts for expected, completed, substitute, and absent.

nodes.name: Show First Visit Study
nodes.summary: Displays members who are having their first study session today.

nodes.name: Send New Member Reminders
nodes.summary: Provides quick-send reminder functionality for tomorrow's new members.

nodes.name: Render Monthly Calendar
nodes.summary: Displays a monthly calendar view with color-coded event markers.

nodes.name: Display Event Details
nodes.summary: Opens a modal showing event details when a calendar date is clicked, via openScheduleModal().

nodes.name: Build Event Summary
nodes.summary: Aggregates and summarizes events for the selected date using buildSummary() and renderRow().

nodes.name: Open Expanded Board
nodes.summary: Opens the full leader status board modal from the dashboard widget.

nodes.name: Navigate Days
nodes.summary: Allows navigating through a 7-day view of leader attendance status.

nodes.name: Apply Filters
nodes.summary: Filters the leader status board by language and time slot.

nodes.name: Select Members
nodes.summary: Checkboxes to select multiple members for bulk operations.

nodes.name: Execute Bulk Action
nodes.summary: Performs the selected bulk action (move team, send SMS, or delete) on checked members.

nodes.name: Select Leaders
nodes.summary: Checkboxes to select multiple leaders for bulk operations.

nodes.name: Execute Bulk Leader Action
nodes.summary: Performs the selected bulk action (move team, send SMS, or delete) on checked leaders.

edges.description: Members are assigned to teams organized by language and time slot
Leaders are assigned to teams and lead study sessions for specific time slots
Member attendance is tracked per session with rate visualization and daily check-ins
Leader attendance is tracked with substitute handling and 7-day status views
Dashboard surfaces first-visit members and new member reminders
Dashboard displays leader status overview and expanded status board
